function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-11-03
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-03                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by migrating the specified invoice note to include YAML frontmatter extracted from visible data, while preserving the entire original note body below the frontmatter. Then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, read nested AGENTS in inbox and finance lanes, preserved exact body text during frontmatter migration, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in /00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR and add frontmatter for the specified invoice. The target file contained all required invoice fields and line items per /99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling complete schema-compliant extraction without guessing. Migration workflow required preserving existing body verbatim, which was done, then inbox-processing workflow required deleting the processed inbox item.
